# 2026-01-06 — Tuesday

Feverish yesterday; better today. Took it slow.

Worked on the the dataset doctor pass. 0.82 is the right knob; 0.86 over-merged, 0.92 missed the obvious near-dupes. Kept it.

Rolled back the pytest change. The perf gain wasn't worth the flakiness.

Reading the Ursula Le Guin essays again. The one on anger still lands.

Hiked Sintra on Saturday. Wind hard enough to lean into.

Walked to Belém after lunch. Got a coffee at Fábrica. Thought about nothing.

Half of "rewriting" is deleting.

Half of "rewriting" is deleting.
